title: helichrysum subdecurrens
intro: Helichrysum subdecurrens, also known as the drooping helichrysum or drooping everlast, is a flowering plant species native to Australia, characterized by its drooping yellow flowers and woody stems. The medicinal properties of Helichrysum subdecurrens include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which are attributed to its essential oils and flavonoids. The health benefits of consuming or applying Helichrysum subdecurrens include reduced inflammation, improved digestion, and relief from respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Helichrysum subdecurrens can be prepared into herbal remedies like teas, tinctures, and essential oils, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
